### The Ashvari:  Glenkin of Glentali

<div style="background-color: #fff8f2; border-left: 4px solid #f0883b; padding: 12px; margin-bottom: 25px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: sans-serif;">
  <span style="color: #f0883b; font-weight: bold; font-size: 1.1em;">🚧 Work in Progress</span>
  <p style="margin: 5px 0 0 0; color: #555555; font-size: 0.95em; line-height: 1.4;">
    This section of the <em>Taliria</em> project documentation is currently being written and reviewed. Content, lore details, and asset placements are subject to change.
  </p>
</div>
